text:
ウォパルの海岸で
また強力なエネミーが
暴れているらしい！

つまりは、困っている人がいる。
ならば、オレと君の出番だ！

今すぐ行こう、と言いたいところだが
実はまだ「宿題」が終わっていない……

くっ、こんなことなら
早く「宿題」をやっておけば……
悪いが、君

Word has it there's another crazy something
or other causing a ruckus along the Coast
down on Wopal!

Where there's a ruckus, there are people in
trouble! And when people are in trouble,
who do they need? Why, you and me,
of course!

Though I'm afraid they must settle for you.
While I'd love to go, I'm afraid I'm still stuck
on this homework assignment, you see...

Alas! If only I'd finished it up earlier! But we
can't change the past, so you go on down
there without me!
